period-house-haslemere-surrey.quote: We're finding, pretty much daily, we catch ourselves in the space doing something wonderfully mundane like cooking in the kitchen or reading books on the sofa in front of the wood-burner, and every time we do, we still can't quite believe how incredibly lucky we have been and how successful your design is.

1960s-house-fernhurst-west-sussex.quote: What I find nice about my home is that it's very spacious and open, so you can hear each other and don't need to run up or downstairs all the time. There are lots of windows so you don't need the lights on all the time, and you look out to the garden wherever you are in the house.

1960s-house-haslemere-surrey.quote: We chose ArchitectureLIVE because of their enthusiasm, collective experience and out-and-out creativity. They were highly engaged with our project and always able to find creative solutions within budget.

period-property-hindhead-surrey.quote: They resolved every challenge in a sensible way, applying a great depth of knowledge about how buildings are put together.

workers-cottage-south-downs-national-par.quote: In contrast to other architects, we found Irene was very positive and generated a number of interesting ideas. We were looking for a design that would contrast with the rest of the house, and ArchitectureLIVE achieved this using clever angles that gave us new views of our garden.

secondary-school-newbury-west-berkshire.quote: ArchitectureLIVE have proven to be visionary thinkers matched by down-to-earth practicality and a passion for detail. Their confident and friendly handling of our project meant I never felt out of my depth.

new-build-retirement-house-fareham-hamps.quote: We think your design is awesome!

1960s-bungalow-haslemere-surrey.quote: ArchitectureLIVE exceeded our expectations of what could be achieved and answered every part of our brief fully. Watching the seasons change through our large gable window are moments we will cherish every day. We couldn't have wished for a better place to bring up our girls, and would like to thank the team wholeheartedly for designing us our perfect and entirely unique family home.

1930s-country-house-mole-valley-surrey.quote: Irene and Jonathan put their minds together and presented multiple feasibility options, exhausting all ideas which allowed us to choose the final design with confidence. We felt really supported throughout the whole process. It just worked for us!

retirement-property-duncton-west-sussex.quote: An excellent and articulate team — listens well to what the client wants and delivers a well thought-through solution.
